posts.text: *MICROSOFT'S OPENAI LICENSE WILL NOW BE NON-EXCLUSIVE
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text:
We are delighted that “Scam Inc”, our investigative podcast hosted by @suelinwong, was a winner at this year’s @PeabodyAwards.

Listen now to discover how this sophisticated, predatory, multi-billion dollar industry operates: http://econ.st/42wUKcQ
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: BREAKING: Microsoft stock, $MSFT, falls -5% after announcing that its OpenAI license will now be nonexclusive and it will no longer pay revenue share to OpenAI.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
I keep hearing about scammers using WhatsApp or this platform, impersonating me and charging for investment advice and stock tips. Etc.  

I don’t have any paid services.  I don’t contact people on WhatsApp and give stock tips. 

Please report and block imposters.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
